name: model-council
description: Ask a council of local (Ollama, vLLM, TRT-LLM, SGLang) and cloud (OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq) AI models. Get individual, categorized (agreement / complementary / conflicting), or fully deconflicted answers with a resolution score.

ollama_address.title: Ollama address
ollama_address.description: Base URL of your Ollama server. Override host/port if Ollama runs remotely or on a non-default port.

council_models.title: Council models (optional)
council_models.description: Leave BLANK for zero-config: the council auto-uses every local Ollama model plus your Ollama :cloud models. Or pin specific ones, comma-separated: 'ollama:llama3,ollama:qwen3.6:27b-mlx,openai:gpt-4o'. Format: provider:model or provider/serverId:model.

auto_council.title: Auto-discover council
auto_council.description: When ON (default) and no council models are pinned above, automatically use all available Ollama chat models (local + :cloud), excluding embedding models.

judge_model.title: Judge model
judge_model.description: Model that categorizes and deconflicts council responses. Use 'auto' to pick the largest council member.

response_mode.title: Default response mode
response_mode.description: One of: individual | categorized | deconflicted | pooled | dialectic. individual = raw answers; categorized = grouped into agreement/complementary/conflicting; deconflicted = iterative resolution loop with a score; pooled = Delphi-style neutral reconsideration (no attribution/ranking shown to members, divergence preserved); dialectic = thesis/antithesis/synthesis (defend your pick, judge builds pros/cons, members re-select).

max_deconflict_rounds.title: Max deconfliction rounds
max_deconflict_rounds.description: Maximum rounds the judge re-questions the council to resolve conflicts (1-10).

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API key
openai_api_key.description: Optional. Enables OpenAI models (gpt-4o, o1, ...) in the council.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API key
anthropic_api_key.description: Optional. Enables Anthropic Claude models in the council.

groq_api_key.title: Groq API key
groq_api_key.description: Optional. Enables Groq-hosted models (fast inference) in the council.

vllm_servers.title: vLLM servers
vllm_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible vLLM servers. Port defaults to 8000. Example: 'gpu1:192.168.1.10:8000,gpu2:192.168.1.10:8001'.

trtllm_servers.title: TensorRT-LLM servers
trtllm_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible TRT-LLM servers. Port defaults to 8000.

sglang_servers.title: SGLang servers
sglang_servers.description: Optional. Comma-separated 'name:host:port' entries for OpenAI-compatible SGLang servers. Port defaults to 30000.

max_tokens.title: Max response tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens requested per model completion.

cloud_concurrency.title: Cloud concurrency
cloud_concurrency.description: Max simultaneous requests to cloud members (Ollama :cloud, OpenAI, Anthropic, Groq). Ollama cloud requires Pro (3 concurrent) or Max (10).

local_concurrency.title: Local concurrency
local_concurrency.description: Max simultaneous requests to local models. Default 1 (sequential) to avoid resource contention; set 0 for unlimited.

completion_retries.title: Completion retries
completion_retries.description: Attempts per completion before giving up on an empty or failed response.

deconflict_verbose.title: Verbose deconfliction
deconflict_verbose.description: When on, deconflicted results include the initial categorization and per-round detail by default.

claude_cli.title: Claude subscription (CLI)
claude_cli.description: Add subscription-backed Claude members via the local `claude` CLI (claude -p) instead of an API key. Requires the Claude Code CLI installed and logged in to a Pro/Max subscription. Members appear as claude-cli:<model>. Only works where the CLI runs (this machine).

claude_cli_models.title: Claude CLI models
claude_cli_models.description: Comma-separated model aliases for the subscription CLI member, e.g. 'opus,sonnet'.

claude_cli_path.title: claude executable path
claude_cli_path.description: Path to the claude binary if it is not on PATH.

codex_cli.title: ChatGPT subscription (Codex CLI)
codex_cli.description: Add a ChatGPT-subscription member via the local `codex exec` CLI instead of an OpenAI API key. Requires the Codex CLI installed and signed in (`codex login` → Sign in with ChatGPT). Codex is a coding agent, so answers are coding-flavored. Members appear as codex-cli:<model>.

codex_cli_models.title: Codex models
codex_cli_models.description: Comma-separated model names for the Codex member. Use 'default' for Codex's configured default model.

codex_cli_path.title: codex executable path
codex_cli_path.description: Path to the codex binary if it is not on PATH.
